top.name: Eternity Gate
top.rules_text: Create a Gate on target tile (16HP). While Gate exists: spells you cast from within 2 tiles of the Gate resolve at Reaction speed AND echo once for free at start of next turn.

channel.name: Eternity Gate (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Gate has 24HP and range is 3

bottom.name: Temporal Storm
bottom.rules_text: All enemies on the board are slowed for 2 turns. Each slowed enemy takes 2 damage at start of each turn. Imbue all tiles within 2 of you with Temporal Drag.

channel.name: Temporal Storm (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also freeze enemies already slowed
